title: Announcing the New App: Report Bugs and Highlight UI Elements Faster with Capture for monday.com!

posts.author: Mariia (Mariia Mykhasiuk)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi everyone!

If you’ve ever tried to report a bug or give design feedback in monday.com, you probably know the struggle:
You notice something’s off, you start typing a long explanation, you add a couple of screenshots in the comments, and then… someone still replies: “Sorry, I don’t quite get it. Can you clarify?”

Sound familiar? We’ve been there too. And honestly, it slows everything down. Small issues turn into endless back-and-forth messages, and instead of fixing problems, teams spend time talking about the problem.

That’s exactly why we built Capture for monday.com. We wanted a simple way to report bugs and give feedback visually - without extra tools, links, or confusion.

With Capture, you can:
Quickly take screenshots right from your browser
Highlight specific UI elements and add clear annotations
Instantly turn your feedback into actionable tasks inside monday.com

No more jumping between tools, no endless explanations. Just clear, visual feedback where your team already works.

Getting started is easy:

  1. Install the app from the monday.com Marketplace.
  2. Enable it in your workspace.
  3. Add the Chrome Extension for instant screenshots and annotations.

Now, instead of “Can you explain this again?”, you’ll hear “Got it. Fixed!”, and that’s exactly how it should be.

We built Capture because we were tired of wasting time on misunderstandings. If you’ve ever felt the same way, give it a try and see how much smoother bug reporting can be.
